ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organisation (e.g., private, public, non-profit) */,
  "organisation_address" TEXT /* Address of the organisation */,
  "organisation_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organisation */,
  "organisation_email" TEXT /* Email address of the organisation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "organisation_id" TEXT /* Reference to the organisation the supplier belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the supplier */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  "supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_contacts" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id", "contact_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier offering the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., medical supplies, equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "image_url")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier the order was placed with */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, procurement manager, supplier) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_supplier_links" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order update, payment confirmation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_type" TEXT /* Type of payment gateway (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id")
)
